pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which copies from /opt/jamovi_datasets/.
Prompt requests the Jamovi project to be saved here.
Prompt requests the report to be saved here.
Our calculated Levene p-value (median center) is 4.02e-06 < 0.05. The threshold reflects typical alpha.
Our calculated Welch's ANOVA p-value is 9.98e-38 < 0.001. The threshold reflects standard reporting cutoff.
Our calculated Games-Howell post-hoc p-value for 1st vs 3rd class is ~0.0 < 0.001.

privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to perform Welch's ANOVA on the real 'TitanicSurvival' dataset, grouping by 'passengerClass' with 'age' as the dependent variable. Independent replication confirmed a Levene's test p-value of 4.02e-06 (< 0.05), a Welch's F statistic of 99.97 with p-value 9.98e-38 (< 0.001), and a Games-Howell 1st vs 3rd class post-hoc p-value of < 0.001. All dataset paths, project paths, and statistical thresholds stated in the metadata have been explicitly verified against ground truth calculations.
